feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BKPF-BSTAT - document status O and W - meaning
entry.content:
Hi ,

Does anybody know the meaning of Document Status O and Document Status W ?

You can see it for example in FB03 doc, in the Header icon or in BKPF table (Doc Status).

What exactly does each status O and W mean ?

Any help is welcome

Regards

entry.title: liveCache Applications plugin in S4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are using the RISE PCE environment, and the Business team wants to use capacity planning apps that require a Live Cache Application Plugin on the HANA component.

Is it generally allowed to install Live Cache on the HANA RISE environment, or would it require an additional cost/license?


Refer : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/21aead0c98bd4755abdacd91c99e3393/96592cfe7187429c9a69fda4e6976c50.html?version=2023.001

Prerequisites for Capacity Planning Apps:

Before you start working with the apps, make sure that the following criteria are met:

Use the right formulas to generate the capacity requirements of the work centers.

Set the work center capacity to finite scheduling to get the capacity requirements of the orders.

Install SAP liveCache (which is the HANA component SAP LCA (also called LCAPPS- or liveCache Applications plugin) for Capacity Scheduling Table and Capacity Scheduling Board apps.

Best Regrads,
Rattasak

entry.title: connection options between S/4 Hana Private Cloud and SSFF?
entry.content:
Is there any other option besides SAP Ruter to integrate S/4 Hana Private Cloud and SAP SuccessFactors (SSFF) and if so, what would it be?

Is it possible to do it with CPI?

entry.title: Subaccount certificate renewal in SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

I have a concern regarding the Subaccount certificate renewal, and it will expire about 20days from today. 

The problem is this subaccount certificate is not under HEC and the Initiated By user SXXXXX is no longer available.

Is it possible to user my own S-User ID to refresh this subaccount certificate?

Please advise Thank you.

entry.title: FTR_create_Letter of Credit_Description of Goods & Services Text in Output Print Form
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we have a requirement to print the content filled in Description of Goods and/or Services in Structure tab in FTR_Create Tcode used for creating Letter of Credit (LC). This content is to be printed in output form

we could see the description content filled in FTR_create tcode in table TLCT_NOTE field note content. However we could not read this text and get printed in output form developed in smartform. 

Could you please advise on the logic to read this text (in LC description) and get it printed in output form developed using smartform. 

We really appreciate your advise in this regard. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA_Open Sales Order migration_Migration Cockpit error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

while migrating open sales in Migration Cockpit through Staging File approach, we couldn't be successful and we are getting below error message in Simulate Step. 

Due to the above error message, we couldn't migrate open sales orders.

we are attempting to check only 1 open sales order however migration is not successful ending up with errors in Simulate Step.

Could you please advise on this and would really appreciate your expert advise on how to fix this error. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Any solution to Backflush/Issue Customer stock B for REM Order (Planned Order)
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have a requirement regarding Backflush/Goods Issue Component (with indicator special stock - B) in a REM Order (Planned Order).

During testing, I found that I am unable to backflush a component with the special stock indicator B for a REM Order. I have also searched for relevant notes or documentation but couldn’t find any information on backflushing components with this indicator.

I would greatly appreciate your guidance on this matter.

Best regards,

entry.title: Created Quantity Contract. But while creating order with reference to the Contract, it also accepts
entry.content: We have created  Contracts (WK1 and WK2 both ). While creating the order with reference to the Contracts, it is also accepting the materials not included in the contract. Where is the issue? Also if we make the order value above the Target Value of contract, then also its accepting and order is getting saved also. Since I am a beginner in SAP but as per my understanding of the Contract topic,both the scenarios should give error. Any help or Guidance in this regard will be highly appreciable.

entry.title: Technical Questions for S/4HANA RISE PCE
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have some questions regarding S/4HANA RISE PCE landscape on AWS for a Greenfield Implementation.

Q1. Client wants to have separate subnets for DEV, QA and Production environments. Please confirm if this can be implemented on RISE and has no technical implications or risks

Q2. Client wants to clarify if /22 is sufficient to accommodate both Prod and SDDR. If /22 is not sufficient then can /21 range be used for Prod and SDDR subnet? Will there be any technical implications or risk associated with this range?

Q3. Client has 2 DNS Servers with different domains and both having Primary and Secondary IP's running in their landscape. They want to get all the DNS server entries added into RISE DNS. Can multiple DNS IP-addresses for the client can be added to RISE DNS

Q4. The general timelines for RISE provisioning is 23 days. By how many days thew timelines will extend in following conditions:
. SDDR
. 21 Languages to be installed
. BP Activation
. 1 additional client 120 in the DEV box (other than 050,100,110)

Q5. As part of IBP provisioning a cloud CI-DS service will be given as default or do we need to select CPI-DS instances separately under Additional Solutions in COF?

Q6. SAP standard document recommends SAC Agent to run on same host Cloud Connector. In case of our client SAC Agent will be installed on the same host as Cloud connector or on a separate EC2 instance in RISE?

Q7. If a RISE provisioned instance(for example SAC agent) is not in use, can the instance remain shutdown and will it incur cost if not used?

Q8. In COF there was no option for Cloud Connector HA under S/4HANA EM while adding Solution. Will the Cloud connector HA be provisioned as a default as part of the landscape?

Q9. Based on FUE sizing the size selected for RISE S/4HANA PCE is S. If during the project there is a requirement to uplift the sizing to M or L, etc based on Quick Sizer report and performance requirements, is it easy to uplift the systems to bigger instances? Are there any restrictions and will there be significant impact on cost?

entry.title: Access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud
entry.content:
I know that we can access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-premise, but is it possible to access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud?

Would there be a difference between the Private and Public Editions of S/4HANA on-cloud

We want to connect Datasphere to the HANA database on a S/4HANA on-cloud.

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: follow-up of amount of egress consumed
entry.content:
Dear SAP,
1/ Where can customer follow-up the (monthly) amount of egress that has already been consumed?
2/ From a technical point of view, how is the egress counted (which tools or technology is being used)? 
Thanks, Steven.

entry.title: what does "fra3" in the FQDN stand for?
entry.content:
Dear,
We are troubleshooting an issue and it is unclear what the 'fra3' stands for in the FQDN:
Example:  hecxxvyyyyyy.fra3.sap.<suffix_customer>
We suspect it's not 'Frankfurt' as we see the same 'fra3' at a customer that is residing at Azure Amsterdam... 
And for SAP DC customers (base option), we see 'rot' instead of 'fra3' in the FQDN, most likely standing for datacenter St. Leon Rot in Germany. 
Please explain. 
Thanks, Steven.

entry.title: External number range for Billing Documents (VF01) possibility in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we have a requirement to map external number range to billing types in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud edition.

We had assigned external number range and ticked external and this is reflected in NRIV table as well for RV_BELEG  number range object.

However while creating billing document, there is no option to key in manual external number range as per the assignment. Please do let us know any possibility to achieve this SAP S/HANA both in Standard and through enhancement route. 

Also, please advise whether external billing number range is possible if we implement BADI as below.

Could you please advise on the possibility to have external number range for billing documents both in SAP Standard or in enhancement route using BADI without having any prefix in number range. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Has anyone implemented Time-of-Use Interfaces in S/4HANA
entry.content: We currently have 3rd party meter data management system providing aggregated interval reads via time-of-use interfaces (EMDUSFORM/EMDUSIFACE) with our ECC instance and AMI setup. Has anyone done a transition to S4/HANA and converted their existing MDUS formulas and interfaces? If so, was your transition a 1-1, or were there differences that required changes to existing setup.

entry.title: F1519 "Schedule Billing Creation" app: can a custom field (e.g. invoice value) be added?
entry.content:
I would like to add a custom field to the invoice data selection criteria of the app F1519 "Schedule Billing Creation". The goal is to only pick documents with value zero and create billing documents automatically.

The selection criteria looks like a "Fiorized" VF06 which from my GUI-days experience could only be extended via enhancement points. Also SAP Guided Answers say that the app has the type "SAP Fiori: Generic Job Scheduling Framework" which cannot be extended. However, in the Extensibility section of the Fiori Reference library the option "Extensibility via SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects" is mentioned. 

Does anybody have an experience extending such Fiori apps?

entry.title: Not option of Country- India in "Mass Upload Utility" app for HSN Creation at Private Cloud,
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are trying to create HSN code at  at Private Cloud by using  "Mass Upload Utility" app, there is not option of Country "India", How to add Country Country "India" while uploading HSN master ?

Thanks,

Ganesh Bhosale
@Ganesh_Bhosale555 ; @suhas_barge ; @kriti_daga

entry.title: Extend My Inbox Purchase Order Item in Private Cloud Edition 2023 FPS01
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have a Private Cloud Edition 2023 FPS01 system and want to extend Purchase Order Item in My Inbox app. I extended C_PurOrdItemEnh view for that. I also cleaned metadata cache and app cache. But we couldn't see the fields neither in line items as default or detail page. Annotations are as follows. 

  @ui.lineItem: [{
            qualifier: 'PurchItem',
            position: 125,
            importance: #HIGH }, {
            position: 125,
            importance: #HIGH
            }]
  @ui.fieldGroup: [{
           qualifier: 'ItemDetails',
           groupLabel: 'Item Details',
           position: 50,
           exclude: false,
           importance: #HIGH,
           value: 'ZZ1_WBS_PDI' }]
  @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
  _ItemExtension.ZZ1_WBS_PDI,
  @ui.lineItem: [{
            qualifier: 'PurchItem',
            position: 130,
            importance: #HIGH }, {
            position: 130,
            importance: #HIGH
            }]
  @ui.identification:{ position: 17, importance: #HIGH}
  @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
  _ItemExtension.ZZ1_WBS_Description_PDI

I tried different version of annotations but we couldn't see them. We just see them in view settings tab in line items. You can see it as follows.

I extended C_PurchaseOrderFs to try to see if it comes to My Inbox PO header. It was came. I also extended My Inbox app for PR and PR items. It was also came. 

Is there any solution for that problem? Or is there a step I'm doing wrong? 

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

entry.title: About the Customer Onboarding Form
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
Our customer’s license is XXS, and as you all know, this license model does not include a separate QA system.

Since the SID information for the QA system is written as a separate system on the Customer Onboarding Form (COF), the form was not accepted on the TDD Assignment side, and they have requested a correction.

The question I would like to ask you is:
Do we have the possibility to correct the COF form created for the customer? If yes, I would appreciate your guidance on how to proceed.

Note: I also tried creating the form from scratch, but it did not ask for any system-related information on that form.

Thank you in advance for your help and support.

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition - MPLS Questionnaire
entry.content:
Hello All,

Our customer will use MPSL connectivity for their new SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition. On the Onboarding Form, within the Templates, we can see that there is 2 questionnaire documents, one being MPLS Questionnaire Clou4C and the other being Cloud4C VPN Questionnaire.

In order to complete S2D process, should we provide both of these documents to the related SAP experts or should we specificaly share only one of them?

Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA On Premise Fiori App Custom field BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Any moderator that can delete this message? I don't see a delete option anywhere.

Sorry.
